[09:36:48.873]                   {

[09:36:48.873]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {

[09:36:48.873]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:48.873]                   {
[09:36:48.873]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:48.873]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:48.873]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:48.873]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:48.873]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:48.873]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:48.873]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:48.873]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:48.873]                     }
[09:36:48.873]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:48.873]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:48.873]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:48.873]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:48.873]                     }
[09:36:48.873]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:48.873]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:48.873]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:48.873]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:48.873]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:48.873]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:48.873]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:48.873]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:48.873]                             next
[09:36:48.873]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:48.873]                             next

[09:36:50.544]                   {
[09:36:50.544]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:50.544]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:50.544]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:50.544]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:50.544]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:50.544]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:50.544]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:50.544]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:50.544]                     }
[09:36:50.544]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:50.544]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:50.544]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:50.544]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:50.544]                     }
[09:36:50.544]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:50.544]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:50.544]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:50.544]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:50.544]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:50.544]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:50.544]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:50.544]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:50.544]                             next
[09:36:50.544]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:50.544]                             next
[09:36:50.544]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:50.544]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:50.544]                           break
[09:36:50.544]                         }
[09:36:50.544]                       }
[09:36:50.544]                     }
[09:36:50.544]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:50.544]                   }
[09:36:50.544]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:36:50.544]                 })
[09:36:50.544]             }))

[09:36:53.428]                     {
[09:36:53.428]                       inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:53.428]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:53.428]                       is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:53.428]                       muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:53.428]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:53.428]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:53.428]                         if (muffled) 
[09:36:53.428]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:53.428]                       }
[09:36:53.428]                       else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:53.428]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:53.428]                         if (muffled) 
[09:36:53.428]                           invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:53.428]                       }
[09:36:53.428]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:53.428]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:53.428]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:53.428]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:53.428]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:53.428]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:53.428]                             name <- restart$name
[09:36:53.428]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:53.428]                               next
[09:36:53.428]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:53.428]                               next
[09:36:53.428]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:53.428]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:53.428]                             break
[09:36:53.428]                           }
[09:36:53.428]                         }
[09:36:53.428]                       }
[09:36:53.428]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:36:53.428]                     }
[09:36:53.428]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:36:53.428]                   }
[09:36:53.428]                 }
[09:36:53.428]             }
[09:36:53.428]         }))

[09:36:54.603]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {

[09:36:54.603]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:54.603]                             next
[09:36:54.603]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:54.603]                             next
[09:36:54.603]                           invokeRestart(restart)

[09:36:54.603]                           break
